title: pinKing
lyric:
[00:00.000] 制作人 : ChiliChill乐团

[00:11.874]Oh villains, ain't but a thing
[00:16.707]Blink of an eye
[00:18.003]I'll show them why I'm King
[00:20.347]Things change, when I'm with you
[00:23.851]Baby, facing your smile, it's so disarming
[00:28.403]Pop up in my head
[00:30.259]Dreaming of the day
[00:32.314]When you come and take me away
[00:35.099]Like a princess
[00:36.466]Don't fret, just be brave
[00:38.243]It's you and me there ain't no other way
[00:43.747]Drop the beat
[00:45.147]I feel
[00:46.210]like a rollercoaster going up and down
[00:49.075]Because Love is whoo~
[00:51.765]I I I know I'm lost
[00:54.134]My yearning heart was stolen by you
